allow: PowerShell(cd d:\\Proyectos\\gamengine; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "packages/server/dist/index.js" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { Write-Output "Server running with PID $\($proc.Id\)"; $proc.Kill\(\) } else { Write-Output "Server exited with code $\($proc.ExitCode\)" })
